DEPT 206 ASBESTOS TRIAL SETTING CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-16-2012 Continued To Aug-16-12 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 503

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-07-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
K.C. Swisher, Esq., of GORDON & REES (619-696-6700), appearing for defendant / moving party Hennessy Industries, Inc.
Oren P. Noah, Esq., of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiff / opposing party Cecil Ray Brawley

RULING:
DEFENDANT HENNESSY INDUSTRIES, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT

Argued and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Hennessy Industries, Inc.'s demurrer to the fourteenth (brake shoe grinding machine - negligence) and fifteenth (brake shoe grinding machine - strict liability, incorrectly numbered as the seventeenth by defendant) causes of action of plaintiff's complaint is sustained without leave to amend. The complaint fails to allege facts sufficient to constitute a cause of action against defendant, and amending the complaint cannot cure this deficiency. Prevailing party is to prepare an order. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 = (220/HEK)

MOTION TO TRANSFER
Off Calendar Jun-20-2011 Off Calendar
